classification_legend.FULLY_OPERATIONAL: Step executes deterministically from registered inputs; producer callable; outputs verified
classification_legend.PARTIAL: Step completes for at least one client OR completes with a non-generic workaround; has identified gaps
classification_legend.NON_EXISTENT: Step has no callable producer in the repo; required output cannot be produced from registered source

steps.notes: Manual operator step. client.yaml and source_manifest.json created for both BlueEdge and FastAPI. FastAPI source_manifest missing dom_layer_path and integration_validation_path but registration step itself is complete.

blocking_issues: No intake contract scripts exist in repo — all intake is via external contracts
BlueEdge archive at external filesystem path (~/Projects/blueedge-clean-run/source-raw/) — not re-runnable from repo
FastAPI uses MANIFEST_FILE_PROXY — not a true archive extraction; underlying source is a pre-existing local directory
Orchestrator has no invocation path for intake when extracted_path is absent
steps.notes: Both clients have extracted source present, so Phase 1+2 currently pass. But the step cannot be re-run from scratch using repo artifacts alone.
Passes for both BlueEdge and FastAPI. BlueEdge: SHA256 of canonical_repo manifest. FastAPI: MANIFEST_FILE_PROXY SHA256. Orchestrator callable, deterministic.
Passes for both clients. extracted_path directories exist. Orchestrator callable, deterministic.

blocking_issues: No generic client-agnostic structural scanner exists in repo
scripts/pios/40.x/ scripts are k-pi-core self-analysis tools — not usable for client source structural analysis
BlueEdge: structural scripts from PI.BLUEEDGE.STRUCTURAL-PIPELINE.40X.01 are external — not present in this repo
FastAPI: bootstrap_fastapi_40x.py exists and produced Phase 3 artifacts, but is FastAPI-specific and not wired into orchestrator
For any new client (Client C), no structural analysis script is available
steps.notes: Both existing clients have 40.x artifacts. But the step is non-repeatable for new clients and non-automated within the orchestrator.
Passes for both BlueEdge and FastAPI (after bootstrap). Orchestrator callable. Validates existence and reads total_nodes.
